title: Universal Metabarcodes (16S & 18S) from SPOT Spatial and Daily Sampling
author: Fletcher-Hoppe, Colette C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This metabarcoding dataset is derived from PCR amplification of marine plankton-derived DNA from samples collected daily around SPOT and from a spatial transect surrounding SPOT (San Pedro Ocean Timeseries) in April 2018. Metabarcoding reads were generated using a single primer set that simultaneously amplifies both 16S and 18S genes, though users should note that specific bioinformatic procedures are required to recover and analyze 18S sequences (see: https://github.com/jcmcnch/eASV-pipeline-for-515Y-926R).
steps_raw: This metabarcoding dataset is derived from PCR amplification of marine plankton-derived DNA from samples collected daily around SPOT and from a spatial transect surrounding SPOT (San Pedro Ocean Timeseries) in April 2018. Metabarcoding reads were generated using a single primer set that simultaneously amplifies both 16S and 18S genes, though users should note that specific bioinformatic procedures are required to recover and analyze 18S sequences (see: https://github.com/jcmcnch/eASV-pipeline-for-515Y-926R).
